summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of sidebar restructure and new Tools page completed. All 18 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
NavSection[] structure with optional heading prop works correctly
Tool-specific config fields render conditionally based on tool.id
Search filtering uses useMemo for performance optimization
2-panel layout properly implemented with 280px left panel
seed_data_creation: Tool data defined as constants in /app/frontend/src/data/toolConstants.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar restructure and Tools page fully working. Tool data is MOCKED as static constants. All 8 tools and 5 integrations render correctly with tool-specific config fields.

sidebar_build_heading.details: BUILD section heading visible in light/muted text (text-white/40)

sidebar_build_items.details: Campaigns, Agents, Tools nav items under BUILD section

sidebar_outside_build.details: Dashboard, Audiences, Channels, Settings are outside BUILD section

tools_navigation.details: Tools nav item navigates to /tools correctly

tools_2_panel_layout.details: Left panel (280px tool list) and right panel (config) render correctly

tools_category_8_items.details: TOOLS category shows 8 tools: Custom Tool, Query, End Call, Voicemail, Transfer Call, Handoff, Send Text, API Request

integrations_category_5_items.details: INTEGRATIONS category shows 5 items: CRM, Google Calendar, Slack, Webhooks, Google Sheets

tool_selection_updates_config.details: Clicking different tools updates the right config panel correctly

custom_tool_config.details: Custom Tool shows Server URL and Parameters Schema (JSON) fields

api_request_config.details: API Request shows Endpoint URL, HTTP Method, Headers (JSON) fields

transfer_call_config.details: Transfer Call shows Transfer To (Phone Number) and Transfer Mode fields

end_call_config.details: End Call shows farewell message checkbox

send_text_config.details: Send Text shows Message Template field with variable syntax hint

knowledge_bases_section.details: Knowledge Bases section with Add Knowledge Base button

messages_section.details: Messages section with Before/After/Error message tags

search_filtering.details: Search filtering works for both tools and integrations

create_tool_button.details: Create Tool button visible with dashed border style

sidebar_collapsed_state.details: Sidebar collapse/expand works correctly, BUILD heading hidden when collapsed

mocked_data_note: ALL tool data is MOCKED using static constants in /app/frontend/src/data/toolConstants.ts. No backend API calls are made.
